calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Apr-08-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Michael J. Hall for Taylor C. Wright, Petitioner (via Zoom).

The Court discussed the unusual fact pattern involving an insurance check made payable to both the estate and the mortgage company. Mr. Hall asserted that the mortgage company, Carrington Mortgage, was holding estate funds, and that such funds should be used to satisfy estate expenses.

The Court noted that Carrington Mortgage had been given notice and had not appeared or filed any objections. The court took the matter under submission with the intent to grant.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Mar-10-2025 Continued To Apr-07-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Feb-03-2025 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Dec-16-2024 Continued To Feb-03-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Oct-16-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Michael Hall appeared by zoom for petitioner.

The court finds that presumption under Probate Code 6124 does not apply as the original will was destroyed in a house fire. The Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration with Will Annexed. The lost will dated December 15, 1995 is admitted to probate. Taylor Wright is appointed as the Administrator of the estate with lost will annexed with full authority (order signed in open court). Bond is not required. Status on close of estate is set for December 16, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Isidoor Bornstein is appointed probate referee.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Sep-13-2023 Continued To Oct-16-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
